rulings.Case Title: JERRY H. KU VS. ANNA KU WONG ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for MAR-12-2018 Line 1 . DEFENDANT ANNA WONG, HELEN LEE, RENA CHIN, BEULAH KU, AVA KU, MELINDA LOW, HARRY FONG, HAROLD FONG DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT continued to April 12, 2018. Parties are ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers, operative complaint and opposition no later than March 29, 2018 with cover letters reflecting new hearing date. =(501/GD)

rulings.Case Title: JERRY H. KU VS. ANNA KU WONG ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for MAR-12-2018 Line 1 . DEFENDANT ANNA WONG, HELEN LEE, RENA CHIN, BEULAH KU, AVA KU, MELINDA LOW, HARRY FONG, HAROLD FONG MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT continued to April 12, 2018. Parties are ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers, operative complaint, opposition and reply no later than March 29, 2018 with cover letters reflecting new hearing date.=(501/GD)

rulings.Case Title: MARTIN YUDOWITZ VS. MART BAILEY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn For Order Compelling Deft Mart Bailey To Permit Entry On Certain Property For Inspection
rulings.Rulings: Real property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for MAR-12-2018 Line 2 . PLAINTIFF MARTIN YUDOWITZ Mtn For Order Compelling Deft Mart Bailey To Permit Entry On Certain Property For Inspection Hearing Required. Parties appear at 8:30 a.m. and engage in meaningful meet and confer efforts. =(501/GD)

rulings.Case Title: WILLOW TREE INVESTMENTS, INC. VS. HAMZA BOUCHAFRA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Real property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for MAR-12-2018 Line 3 . DEFENDANT HAMZA BOUCHAFRA MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD GRANTED, subject to opposition. Counsel to prepare order and present it for execution at the hearing. =(501/GD)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN E. WAI VS. PAUL OEI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for MAR-12-2018 Line 4 . DEFENDANT PAUL OEI Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment GRANTED. Defendant to file and serve answer no later than March 12, 2018 by 4:00 p.m. =(501/GD)

rulings.Case Title: INNO EKEH DR VS. WINKI TRACY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for MAR-12-2018 Line 5 . DEFENDANT WINKI TRACY DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend to address all issues raised by demurrer. Plaintiff shall have 5 days from notice of entry of order to file amended complaint. =(501/GD)

rulings.Case Title: 415 TWENTY SEVENTH STREET, LLC VS. RAFAT HADDAD ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real property/Housing Court Law & Motion Calendar for MAR-12-2018 Line 6 . DEFENDANT RAFAT HADDAD, TRUKIEH HADDAD MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED. Notice is fatally defective as it fails to comply with CCC 1946.1(h).=(501/GD)
